headline: ‘Dinosaur’ Tech Stocks Reborn as AI Fuels $1.7 Trillion Rally
summary: (Bloomberg) -- They were all stars of the dot-com era before fading into the background as the bubble burst and a new generation of tech darlings rose to the forefront.
